message:
fix(config): use append-based WAL path convention for sidecar cleanup

The WAL sidecar cleanup added in d140d5f used
Path::with_extension("db-wal") which REPLACES the extension. But
SQLite names WAL files by APPENDING "-wal" to the full filename.
For the default "beads.db", both give "beads.db-wal", but for a
custom filename like "data.sqlite", with_extension would produce
"data.db-wal" while SQLite creates "data.sqlite-wal".

Switch to format!("{}-wal", ...) to match the convention used by
every other WAL path computation in the codebase (doctor.rs:715,
doctor.rs:2880, config/mod.rs:4361, config/mod.rs:4748, etc.).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
